utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Now check each for full specification: 
- property: includes selected property details (address, type, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, features) and price, plus closing date — fully specified. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (structure, loan amount, down payment, interest rate, term, monthly payment, fees, pre-approval validity) — fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes provider, service, cost, timeline — fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes provider, service, cost, scheduled date — fully specified. 
- setup_services: includes utilities setup (provider, services, cost, activation date) and a structural survey (service, cost, date) — adequately specified. 
- total_budget: includes a complete cost breakdown with line items and totals — fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes selections that correspond to categories in the ground-truth ratings: a purchase property (a single-story bungalow that aligns with the 'Family House' profile), purchase financing (Traditional Mortgage), legal services (Premium Legal Package), moving services (Standard Moving based on price CAD $650), utility setup (Premium Utilities based on price CAD $280), and a structural survey (Full Structural Survey at CAD $650). Mapping each named service to the closest matching ground-truth item yields their ratings.
